Gemini vs Perplexity (2026): Which Should You Use?

Gemini and Perplexity are both popular tools in the AI Chatbots & Assistants space. Here's how they compare.

GeminiPerplexity
MakerGooglePerplexity AI
PricingFree plan available; Gemini Advanced from $19.99/mo (via Google One AI Premium)Free plan available; Pro $20/mo
Free tierYesYes
Best forUsers already inside the Google Workspace / Android ecosystem.Fast, cited research and fact-checking instead of manual Googling.
